text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
<chrname> is performing well, and it's
only a matter of time until she earns the right to
enter the Twinkle Star Climax.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the increased attention results in a
bogus news article. It becomes a major incident,
with reporters knocking at the gates of Tracen
Academy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The director proposes temporarily restricting
media access to the academy, but reconsiders
after hearing Reporter Otonashi's passionate
plea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In an effort to quell the misconceptions surrounding me, Reporter Otonashi plans a new article titled Up Close and Personal with Trainer !
